name: 婚禮被闖入（盛宴與衝突的碰撞）
description: 盛大的婚禮場景中，落魄的獅家人強行闖入求饒，白蓮花企圖破壞婚禮，最終以養父擋刀犧牲收場。婚禮的喜慶與暴力的碰撞產生極致的戲劇衝突。
tags: 最幸福的場合遇上最絕望的仇人，喜悲的極端反差

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: How can this be? You get to marry into a rich family, but I am reduced to this. Zanthy, fate brought me to you today, so don't blame me. I will definitely find a way to ruin your wedding.
examples.context: 最幸福的場合遇上最絕望的仇人，喜悲的極端反差
